HABADTE.narrative: RPGLE program in domain 'Patient Management'. Contains 13 rule(s) with avg confidence 75%.

key_rules.rule: Exclude Voided Accounts: Accounts marked as Voided (flag = 'V') are cancelled records and must never appear on the active census.
Exclude Outpatients: Only inpatients appear on this census. Accounts with I/O indicator = 'O' (Outpatient) are excluded.
Exclude Pre-Admitted Patients: A patient with file indicator = 0 is a pre-admission — not yet formally admitted. These must be excluded from the active census.

Census Date — Admission Date Check: A patient admitted after the census date is not yet active on that date. If the patient's admission date is later than the requested census date, the patient is excluded from the report.

Census Date — Discharge Date Check: A patient who has already been discharged on or before the census date is no longer active. If discharge date is set (non-zero) and is on or before the census date, the patient is excluded. A discharge date of zero means the patient has not been discharged and is always considered active (subject to other filters).
